description: An EHS specialist needs to schedule the annual mandatory 'Hazard Communication' training for all plant employees.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all active plant employees who require the training.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves a list of all employees assigned to the 'Plant Operations' department.

nodes.task_description: Create a new training session in the learning management system for the 'Hazard Communication' course.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the new session.

nodes.task_description: Enroll all the identified employees in the session and send them a calendar invitation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully enrolls all employees and notifications are sent.
